title: desmodium orbiculare var. salvinii
intro: Desmodium orbiculare var. salvinii, also known as Mexican clover or finger clover, is a perennial legume native to Mexico and the southern United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Desmodium orbiculare var. salvinii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support wound healing, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and cholesterol. Herbal preparations of Desmodium orbiculare var. salvinii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
